pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which curls image files for these names, and seed_ac_data.py which creates the corresponding synthetic user records.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly sets PHOTO_DIR to this path and creates it.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires uploading photos for three specific synthetic users: Victor Schulz, Tamara Kowalski, and Leon Fischer. The user records are synthetically generated and seeded into the 2N Access Commander database via seed_ac_data.py. Their designated image files (victor_schulz.jpg, tamara_kowalski.jpg, leon_fischer.jpg) are downloaded to /home/ga/Documents/SecurityPhotos by setup_task.sh. The image directory and target mappings in the metadata are accurate and align with the environment setup scripts.
